summary: Construction website similar to Guru.com called 'Ghar Builder'
architectural_notes: Website similar to Guru.com for construction services
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Construction-themed hero banner showing building site or blueprints with warm color overlay (hero-construction.dim_1920x600.png)
- Logo for Ghar Builder with construction tool or building iconography (ghar-builder-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Icon set for project categories: residential building, commercial building, renovation tools (category-icons.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that introduces Ghar Builder as a construction marketplace platform where users can find construction professionals and post construction projects
Implement project posting functionality where users can create construction project listings with title, description, budget range, and project category (residential, commercial, renovation, etc.)
Create a project browse/search page where users can view all posted construction projects with filtering by category and budget range
Implement professional profile creation where construction professionals can create profiles with their name, specialty (contractor, architect, engineer, etc.), experience, and service description
Create a professionals directory page where users can browse and search construction professionals by specialty and filter by experience level
Integrate Internet Identity authentication so users can sign in to post projects or create professional profiles

Design the interface with a construction-industry themed visual style that uses earthy warm tones (oranges, browns, yellows), bold typography suitable for a professional marketplace, and incorporates construction imagery and iconography throughout the interface
